metadata.title: Tight 2v1 Mid Fight Ends With a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Caught these opponents off guard with a quick peek and steady aim. Watch how positioning helped win this close fight.
What’s your favorite spot to hold mid? Share your plays below.
